title: astragalus scoparius
intro: Astragalus scoparius, also known as milk vetch or white milk vetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus scoparius include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and preventing diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Astragalus scoparius is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, dried extract, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
